content: Real-world SSRF CVE (openedx-platform GHSA-64cv-vxpr-j6vc/GHSA-328g-7h4g-r2m9): an admin-settable SAML metadata_source URL was fetched server-side with no scheme/IP validation, allowing access to cloud instance-metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254) and internal network scanning. Fix: validate_saml_metadata_url() enforcing https, blocking loopback/link-local/reserved/RFC1918 ranges (opt-out flag for legit same-network IdPs), plus a request timeout. Directly applicable: SPInstance's federation metadata URL is fetched by shibd itself (not the operator), but any operator-side metadata-mirror/refresh fetch is the same class of risk.
